_mode_help: proxy = run the live intercepting proxy; selftest = run the offline engine self-test (14 assertions).
_bind_help: Splice's own listener. Burp already uses 8080 on this box, so Splice binds 8123.
_ca_help: Persistent CA: generated on first run and written to these paths (relative to root). Import ca/splice-ca.pem into your browser / Burp ONCE. Delete the files to rotate.
_intercept_timeout_help: When chained through Burp, how long Splice waits for the upstream response so you can hold+forward in Burp's Intercept without Splice timing out. Default 60s.
_upstream_proxy_help: Set to a downstream proxy 'host:port' (e.g. Burp at 127.0.0.1:8081) to chain Browser -> Splice -> Burp -> target. Empty = Splice dials the origin directly.
